allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/login" -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $r.Content | Select-String "SgOps" | Select-Object -First 3)

PowerShell($pages = @\("/login", "/signup", "/prospect"\); foreach \($p in $pages\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000$p" -UseBasicParsing -MaximumRedirection 0 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "$p -> $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "$p -> $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)" } })
